# Recompact3 Spec4k Density Contract

## Recompact 3
full compaction min recompact growth defaults to 3% so long sessions can reclaim again sooner after a compact

## Spec 4k
speculative pre-turn buffer defaults to 4k tokens for earlier preemptive compact without over-triggering

## Tool densify
ExitPlanMode/UltraSwarm/TodoList/UpdateGoal always-on tool descriptions stay contract-complete with denser wording

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool vitest
